name: stems-from-mix
description: Extract stems (vocals, drums, bass, other) from a finished stereo mix using Demucs htdemucs_ft, then hand off to stems-to-mixdown for unity-sum mixdowns. The honest framing: separation is approximation. Bleed is real. Separated stems are sketches that read as deliverables only after a human listens. Writes a stems.manifest.yaml with classifications already filled in (no guessing — the model knows what it produced) so the downstream skill doesn't re-classify. Use when the input is a single audio file (not a folder of stems) and the user asks for an acapella, an instrumental, source separation, or any mix-to-stems extraction.
